query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanViewBookings BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanViewProfessionals BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanViewRooms BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanCheckIn BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanManagePatients BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2K2nZhchkWvioe9.44e5ea8f5c60 --database BKg3JWXSVAysuyURANpvoX --execute

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanViewBookings BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanViewProfessionals BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanViewRooms BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanCheckIn BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permCanManagePatients BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NULL;
